query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN skill_id_1 != '' AND skill_id_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_skill1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN skill_id_2 != '' AND skill_id_2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_skill2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN skill_id_3 != '' AND skill_id_3 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_skill3,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE monster_id NOT LIKE 'M_W04%';

  SUM(CASE WHEN skill_id_2 != '' AND skill_id_2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_skill2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN skill_id_3 != '' AND skill_id_3 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_skill3,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM game_monster_catalog WHERE monster_id NOT LIKE 'M_W04%';
